name: H-D Visa Signature Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 10,000 points (redeemable for a $100 H-D Gift Card) after spending $500 in eligible purchases within the first 90 days

earning_rates.category: Harley-Davidson dealerships, h-d.com, H-D Museum, Factory Tours, H-D Insurance
Restaurants, fast food, bars, hotels and other lodging

earning_rates.notes: 1 point per mile ridden — H.O.G. member exclusive, requires mileage submission

sources.notes: Issuer product page (U.S. Bank co-brand site) — static HTML, scraper-friendly
Third-party review — WalletHub may block cron UA, use as cross-reference only

notes: Successor to the Barclays-issued Harley-Davidson card (transferred to U.S. Bank ~2024). 0% intro APR for 9 billing cycles on purchases and balance transfers, then 17.49%–30.49% variable. Sibling product H.O.G. Elite Visa Signature ($99 AF) is a separate catalog entry.
